name: Spicy Chopped Eggplant
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Bake the eggplant for 1 hour until it is cool enough to handle.
3. Peel and chop the eggplant coarsely.
4. Blend the scallions, parsley, pepper, garlic, vinegar, and olive oil in a food processor.
5. Transfer the mixture to a bowl and add the coarsely chopped eggplant and salt to taste.
6. Serve chilled or at room temperature.
